headline: Paymentus (PAY) Moves 10.2% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Paymentus (PAY) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
